parameters.query:
INSERT INTO llamadas_agendadas (lead_id, nombre_contacto, titulo, notas, inicio, fin, estado)
SELECT
  (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE RIGHT(REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(phone,''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 10) = $4 LIMIT 1) AS lead_id,
  $1 AS nombre_contacto,
  'Llamada agendada con ' || $1 AS titulo,
  $2 AS notas,
  $3::timestamptz AS inicio,
  $5::timestamptz AS fin,
  'agendada' AS estado;
